text_block_list.text: I'm walking along the beach, when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad we got some yakisoba<n>dogs from
that beach hut!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the owner said it's his most<n>prized recipe.
We should eat up before<n>they go cold.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: His most prized recipe?! Okay, let's<n>dig i—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Aaahhh!

A bird—a black kite—suddenly swoops<n>down and
steals the yakisoba dog<n>from Nishino Flower's
hands!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh no. Well, I guess you can't argue<n>with Mother
Nature.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Buuut at least it didn't carry you<n>away. Here, you
can have mine.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?! A-are you sure you don't<n>mind?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep, go ahead. My horoscope<n>said I should
stay away from red<n>ginger today anyhow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You'll actually be doing me a favor by<n>eating it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, thank you...

The next day at the academy, I run<n>into Nishino
Flower glancing this way<n>and that as if searching
for someone.
choice_data_list: Are you trying to find someone?
Are you trying to find someone?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Actually, I'm looking for Sky.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There's something I wanted to give<n>her, but I
don't know where she could<n>be.

I ask if she's tried looking near the<n>forest where
they ran into each other<n>previously.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh—no, I haven't! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But where near the forest... Iguess I'll just have to look!

I offer to join Nishino Flower in her<n>search for
Seiun Sky, and she accepts.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, this is the last likely spot where<n>she'd
come to nap, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah—Sky?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Did... did someone just call<n>my name?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh... Flower? How come you're out<n>of breath?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... Um, I have a present foryou!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A present? What for?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sky, you always behave as if<n>nothing's a big
deal...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But you gave me your yakisoba dog<n>at the
beach, and before that, you<n>helped me find the
stuff I'd lost...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and there was that time you got<n>that scary
centipede out of the<n>flowerbed for me too,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did I? You youngsters have such<n>impressive
memories.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's why today, I really<n>wanted to
show you how much I<n>appreciate all of it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's a flower crown. I wanted to give<n>it to you
while the buds are in full<n>bloom.
choice_data_list: You really worked hard to get that crown to her.
A flower crown of gratitude. How sweet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yep! I was running all over the place!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that's why you were outof breath?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Since you showed up in such a rush, I<n>figured
you found out I was ditching<n>class and came to
drag me back.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean you're here playing<n>hooky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Whoops. Me and my big mouth.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: S-Sky! Geez... What am I going to do<n>with you?

Seiun Sky puts the flower crown on<n>her head,
and Nishino Flower escorts<n>her back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'm really happy with<n>how it turned
out!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks again, Sky, for everything<n>you've done
for me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha. You're overthinking all<n>this. Not that I
mind, though.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Even if I am overthinking it... I was<n>really happy
when you helped me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...It was nothing. Really.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? N-nothing. Anyhoo...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the crown. And since<n>you came all
the way here, how's<n>about relaxin' a little?

The sunlight shines gently through the<n>trees as
Seiun Sky and Nishino Flower<n>relax for a while.
